title: AI Could Delete EVERYTHING! Businesses Ignored This! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that agentic AI poses overlooked security threats including prompt injection, data deletion, and unauthorized actions. He contends that businesses are hesitant to deploy agentic AI due to these risks despite its potential.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof outlines security risks tied to agentic AI: prompt injection, data deletion, and unauthorized actions taken by autonomous agents. The argument is that these threats are often overlooked, and that businesses hesitate to deploy agentic AI because of them despite its potential. The takeaway is that agentic capability and security exposure scale together, which slows adoption.
